query:
-- payments: أعمدة إضافية
ALTER TABLE payments 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `receiptUrl` varchar(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lateFee` decimal(15,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lateDays` int NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `notes` text NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reminderSent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `escalationLevel` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

-- tenants: أعمدة التقييم
ALTER TABLE tenants
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `paymentRating` int NULL DEFAULT 5,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `propertyRating` int NULL DEFAULT 5,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cooperationRating` int NULL DEFAULT 5,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `overallRating` decimal(3,2) NULL DEFAULT 5.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ratingNotes` text NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `phone2` varchar(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nationality` varchar(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `occupation` varchar(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `emergencyContact` varchar(30) NULL;

-- maintenance_requests: أعمدة إضافية
ALTER TABLE maintenance_requests
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `assignedPhone` varchar(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `estimatedCost` decimal(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `actualCost` decimal(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `scheduledDate` date NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `completedDate` date NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ownerApproval` tinyint(1) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `images` json NULL;
